title: Almost Perfect Legendary IVs
description: This Cobblemon addon makes sure that every legendary or mythical Pokémon that spawns has three perfect IVs, with the rest being random.
body:
Gives all legendary and mythical Pokémon exactly 3 perfect IVs on spawn. The other 3 IVs are randomized, so every encounter still feels unique. Designed to make legendary Pokémon more special without being too overpowered.

Fully server-side, no need for players to install anything.

**Features:**

- Legendary and mythical Pokémon spawn with 3 guaranteed perfect IVs
- Remaining 3 IVs are randomly generated for variety
- Affects all spawns
- Configurable in almostperfectlegendaryivs.json
  - Change number of perfect IVs
  - Override the default list of legendary/mythical Pokémon
  
Originally made for a private multiplayer server, but I figured others in the community might find it useful too.
